reason: Review against backend checklist and core KGTraceVis invariants.
Verify scripts call reusable src/kgtracevis modules without duplicating logic.
Verify experiment/metric code does not add unsupported KG facts or require Neo4j.
Verify deterministic handling of empty inputs, invalid data, and low-confidence outputs.
Verify tests and command quality gates pass.
Verify CLI experiment output remains concise and reproducible.
Review helper reuse and duplicate metric patterns.
